Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"

Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{デフォルトソート:かみかわまち}}
{{座標一覧}}
{{citation needed|かみかわまち}}
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:神川町の建築物}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:神川町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:神川町の建築物|version=92863006}}
{{wikidata link|Q138026463}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:神川町の建築物]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Kanasana Shrine]]
[[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
[[Category:Architecture in Saitama by Municipality]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
[[Category:Kamikawa, Saitama]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Jawiki pages with translated titles]] (crud category cleanup)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Architecture_of_Kamikawa_Town here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
